---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new utility, validator, or data-table improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

<!-- What are you trying to do that Abzar doesn't currently support? What workaround are you using? -->

**Proposal**

<!--
A sketch of the API you'd like to see. For example:
  \Eram\Abzar\Validation\PostalCode::validate('1234567890');
Include expected inputs, outputs, and edge cases.
-->

**Alternatives**

<!-- Other libraries, hand-rolled solutions, or workarounds you considered. -->

**Scope check**

- [ ] This fits abzar's charter (framework-agnostic, zero-runtime-dep Persian utility).
- [ ] This is not jalali/shamsi calendar work (that belongs in `eramhq/daynum`).
- [ ] This is not WordPress-specific wiring (that belongs in `eramhq/persian-kit`).
